title: Kollur Mookambika Temple
tagline: Kollur Mookambika Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Kollur Mookambika Temple is located at Kollur in Byndoor Taluk of Udupi District in the region of Tulunadu ,state of Karnataka, near Kundapur India.
overview.description: Kollur Mookambika Temple is located at Kollur in Byndoor Taluk of Udupi District in the region of Tulunadu ,state of Karnataka, near Kundapur India. It is a Hindu temple dedicated to the mother goddess Mookambika. Mookambika is the union of Adi Parashakti and Parabramha as the Linga has integrated on its left side "Maha Kali, Maha Lakshmi and Maha Saraswathi". The temple is very special because it is part of the 108 Durgalayas and 108 Shivalayas.

topPlaces.name: Kodachadri
topPlaces.description: Kodachadri is a mountain peak with dense forests (elevation - 1,343 metres above sea level) in the Western Ghats in South India (Shivamogga District, Karnataka), 78 km from Shimoga. Kodachadri is the highest peak in Shivamogga district.

topPlaces.name: Adagalale
topPlaces.description: Adagalale is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sagara taluka of Shimoga district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kollur Mookambika Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kollur Mookambika Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kollur Mookambika Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kollur Mookambika Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kollur Mookambika Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kollur Mookambika Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kollur Mookambika Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kollur Mookambika Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodachadri, Adagalale.
